widgets_values:
A clean, high-key studio portrait features a central subject captured in a sharp headshot composition against a solid, vibrant cerulean blue backdrop. The lighting is soft and even, characteristic of a professional beauty dish or large softbox, which minimizes harsh shadows and creates a subtle, healthy glow across the skin. The focus is tack-sharp on the eyes, with a shallow depth of field that gently softens the texture of the hair as it recedes toward the shoulders.

The subject possesses a symmetrical, heart-shaped face with a neutral, poised expression and a direct gaze. Their hair is a bright, cool-toned platinum blonde, styled in a sleek, center-parted bob that falls just to the collarbone with slightly textured ends. Their complexion is smooth and radiant, complemented by a light application of makeup that emphasizes the natural arch of the well-defined, dark blonde eyebrows. The eyes are a warm hazel-brown, framed by dark, delicate lashes, while the lips are a soft, natural rose-pink with a slight satin finish.

The subject wears a crisp, minimalist white turtleneck sweater made of a fine-ribbed, lightweight knit fabric. The garment's clean lines and bright tone provide a high-contrast transition between the subject and the saturated blue background. The overall atmosphere is modern and clinical yet approachable, defined by the precision of the studio environment and the clarity of the facial features.

nodes.title: Add Skin Detail Explained
widgets_values:
## Prompt
Describe features of the face you want to have, such as:
- man/woman, freckles, red blush on cheeks, long dark eyelashes, acne, mascara, without-makeup, facial hair, etc

## Denoise
- Higher denoise → more change to the face *(recommended 0.15–0.35)*

## Feature Toggles
`nose` `r_eye` `l_eye` `r_brow` `l_brow` `u_lip` `l_lip`
- Features toggled **on** (`true`) will change
- Features toggled **off** (`false`) will be retained

nodes.title: Image Switch Explained
widgets_values:
Toggle Off = Z-image-turbo image
Toggle On = Load Image

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values:
## About SeedVR2

You can watch a comprehensive tutorial from the author on [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MBtWYXq_r60) or check out the [Github](https://github.com/numz/ComfyUI-SeedVR2_VideoUpscaler).

## Quick Notes
Hover over the node inputs for tooltip info from author

input_noise_scale softens higher frequency details (e.g. skin textures)

latent_noise_scale softens low frequency details. Best around 0.01-0.05 (but depends on upscale factor)

Nodes support alpha masks
Bypass (ctrl+B) the "LoraLoaderModelOnly" if you do not want to add freckles (also add/remove "freckles" from the prompt)

nodes.title: Negative Prompt
widgets_values: plastic, smooth, glossy, cartoon, anime, worst quality, low quality, illustration, 3d, 2d, painting, cartoons, sketch, anime

nodes.title: Positive Prompt
widgets_values: Close-up professional photograph of a woman, detailed face skin and visible skin pores, detailed natural skin and blemishes without-makeup, detailed skin texure, detailed lips, natural skin pores, subtle skin imperfections, visible skin pores, slightly cracked lips, skin discoloration, intricate detailed iris, perfect eyes, soft freckles
